//: Fleet-owned egress allowlist for LOCAL agent execution (the hosts a local
agent run may reach). Authored here in template/, cascaded to every member.
PHASE 1 is plumbing only: mode is 'off' — nothing enforces allowDomains yet.
INVARIANT: allowDomains must be a SUBSET of gh-aw's expanded firewall
allowDomains (the CI agent already trusts these) — enforced by the fleet
check-all gate. Grow this list only from traffic proven in the observe soak,
and only with a host gh-aw already permits. A leading '*.' entry is a suffix
wildcard (matches any subdomain of the suffix).
